description: Test-level goToTest jumps (PR-B). Only the PASS-resolving forward-jump permutation is a combined-suite fixture; the FAIL-path behaviors (backward jump re-run, unknown-target FAIL marker, cycle cap) are asserted in focused it() tests in core-core.test.js since they resolve to FAIL. Cross-platform via node -e.

tests.description: PASSes and routes goToTest to 'forward-target', jumping over 'middle'.

Jumped over by the forward goToTest — never runs. Its step exits 1 ON PURPOSE: if the jump ever regresses to a no-op, `middle` runs and FAILs the spec, so this fixture actually enforces that the jump skips it (mirrors the routing-goToStep artifact).
Reached via the jump; runs and PASSes.
